public_reputation: Known around Ashforge Quarry through steady work as a quarry liaison.

manner: Carries role-shaped habits that make local pressure visible in the way they speak and judge strangers. In Ashforge Quarry, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of a quarry liaison in and around Ashforge Quarry, keeping ordinary obligations from turning into public disorder.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Quarry workable by absorbing local strain before it becomes a visible scandal, shutdown, or breach of order.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of quarry liaison credible while managing pressure tied to status, access, logistics, and local reputation in Ashforge Quarry.

Veyra Chaincourt becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with predators, avalanches, geothermal bursts around Ashforge Quarry.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Veyra Chaincourt is immediately readable as a hildran wyvernharn tied to Ashforge Quarry.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Quarry: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces

first_impression: Veyra Chaincourt presents as someone shaped by the duties of a quarry liaison and the daily pressures of Ashforge Quarry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a quarry liaison, and proof that strangers will not make Ashforge Quarry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Veyra Chaincourt refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a hildran wyvernharn too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Veyra Chaincourt adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Veyra Chaincourt always knows more about Ashforge Quarry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a quarry liaison in Ashforge Quarry.
